mapper.sql: id, ticket_no, description, submit_time, status, status_changed_at, deleted, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO problem_ticket ( ticket_no, description, submit_time, status, status_changed_at, deleted, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{ticketNo}, #{description}, #{submitTime}, #{status}, #{statusChangedAt}, #{deleted}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM problem_ticket WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE

SELECT
FROM problem_ticket WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE FOR UPDATE

SELECT
FROM problem_ticket WHERE deleted = FALSE AND id NOT IN (SELECT ticket_id FROM problem_ticket_metric) ORDER BY id

SELECT
FROM problem_ticket WHERE deleted = FALSE ORDER BY id
